title: FIX: Python MeshtasticAdapter silent drop (python/src/lichen/interface/meshtastic/adapter.py)
description: Policy VIOLATION: spec/appendix-bufferbloat.md §5 'No Silent Drops'. Current: deque maxlen=64 silently discards oldest. Fix: raise QueueFull error instead of silent drop. This is a bug, not just missing feature.
